description: A designed social-media graphic in a portrait/Instagram-card format produced by the official White House account. The dominant visual is a large, desaturated grayscale booking-style/mugshot photo of a young Black man with short hair and a short beard, looking directly at the camera against a plain gray background, filling the left two-thirds of the frame. Inset at upper right is a rounded-corner color photo of a smiling white woman wearing sunglasses, a gray fleece jacket marked 'FLETC' and a backpack, standing on a mountain overlook; a caption overlaid on that inset reads 'Innocent American & DHS Employee Lauren Bullis.' Across the bottom third, a bold white sans-serif headline (with the words 'Naturalized Under' highlighted in a red box) reads: 'Immigrant Naturalized Under Biden Murders Three People, Includng DHS Employee' (note the typo 'Includng'). Beneath the headline is the White House wordmark with its small engraved building icon: 'The WHITE HOUSE.' The composition uses a stark visual contrast technique—the menacing, desaturated alleged perpetrator versus the warm, smiling, named 'innocent' victim—to evoke fear and grief and to attribute the crime to immigration policy under the prior (Biden) administration. The propaganda technique is fear appeal plus victim personalization, blaming a political opponent's naturalization policy. The accompanying tweet adds 'THIS IS OUR WHY,' framing the killing as justification for the administration's deportation agenda. Target audience: the general public and the administration's political base.
notable_text: Immigrant Naturalized Under Biden Murders Three People, Includng DHS Employee | Innocent American & DHS Employee Lauren Bullis | The WHITE HOUSE
